step1.title: Measurement & Material

included.title: Included by default
included.description: Assembly kit with sealing is a standard option and is automatically added to the total price.

dimensions.title: Dimensions of the flap
dimensions.description: Please note the maximum size of the wall opening for the AquaLOCK® flap is 1100 × 1100 mm.

step1.validation: Please enter a valid width and height between 600 mm and 1100 mm.

material.title: Material
material.description: In most cases, galvanization provides sufficient corrosion protection, especially as each flap is additionally primed and painted. However, if the flap is exposed to saltwater, we recommend stainless steel for enhanced durability and rust resistance.

color.title: Colour varieties
color.description: In order to customize the colour of your AquaLOCK® flap, you can choose between 216 RAL colours.
color.freeColors: Seven standard colours (white and six shades of gray) are available at no extra cost.
color.note: Note: The colour displayed may differ from the actual colour due to monitor settings. No guarantee can be given.

opening.title: Opening direction
opening.description: The AquaLOCK® flap is always supplied with hinges and can be installed vertically or horizontally.
